code:
import io
import string
import list

fn byte_at_or(_ s: String, _ i: Int) -> Int
  match string.byte_at(s, i)
  when Some(b)
    b
  when None
    -1
  end
end

fn is_ws(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 13
end

fn parse_ints(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  let n = string.len(s)
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    let b = byte_at_or(s, i)
    if is_ws(b)
      i = i + 1
    else
      mut j = i
      mut scanning = true
      while scanning
        if j >= n
          scanning = false
        else
          let bj = byte_at_or(s, j)
          if is_ws(bj)
            scanning = false
          else
            j = j + 1
          end
        end
      end
      let tok = string.substring(s, i, j)
      match string.parse_int(tok)
      when Some(v)
        result = list.push(result, v)
      when None
        ()
      end
      i = j
    end
  end
  result
end

fn remove_one(_ xs: List<Int>, _ target: Int) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut removed = false
  let n = xs.len()
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    match xs.get(i)
    when Some(v)
      if not removed and v == target
        removed = true
      else
        result = list.push(result, v)
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  result
end

fn sort_desc(_ xs: List<Int>) -> List<Int>
  mut remaining = xs
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  while remaining.len() > 0
    match list.max(remaining)
    when Some(m)
      result = list.push(result, m)
      remaining = remove_one(remaining, m)
    when None
      remaining = []
    end
  end
  result
end

fn read_line_or_empty() -> String
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
end

let line1 = read_line_or_empty()
let line2 = read_line_or_empty()
let nums = parse_ints(line1)
let k_parsed = string.parse_int(string.trim(line2))
let k = match k_parsed
when Some(v)
  v
when None
  0
end
let sorted = sort_desc(nums)
let total = sorted.len()
let k_eff = if k < total
  k
else
  total
end
mut out = ""
mut i = 0
while i < k_eff
  match sorted.get(i)
  when Some(v)
    if i == 0
      out = "#{v}"
    else
      out = "#{out} #{v}"
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  i = i + 1
end
println(out)
